# Ralph Progress — LAN & Bluetooth iteration
# Auto-updated by ralph.sh — do not edit manually

## Codebase Patterns
- Auth is opt-in: `AUTH_ENABLED` env var (default false). `/health` endpoint exposes `"auth": true|false` for client discovery.
- macOS client uses `setAuthHeader(&request)` helper to conditionally add Bearer token. Windows uses `SetAuthHeader(client)` overload.
- `isConfigured` only requires `hostURL`/`HostUrl` — token is optional for LAN-only deployments.
- Branch `ralph/lan-and-bluetooth` is based on `ralph/copy-everywhere-queue-ux` (not `main`), since `main` only has 2 initial commits.
- mDNS service type is `_copyeverywhere._tcp` (constant in `discovery.ServiceType`). TXT records: `version`, `auth`. Clients browse this same type for auto-discovery.
- Server host app (`macos/CopyEverywhereServer/`) follows the same AppDelegate + NSStatusItem + NSPopover pattern as the client. `ServerProcess` is the subprocess manager (`@MainActor` ObservableObject).
- Go binary path convention: sibling `copyeverywhere-server` next to the Swift executable. Build independently with `go build -o copyeverywhere-server .` in `server/`.

## 2026-04-12 - US-035
- What was implemented:
  - Added `AUTH_ENABLED` env var (default false) to server config
  - `getEnvBool()` helper in config/config.go
  - main.go conditionally applies auth middleware only when `AUTH_ENABLED=true`
  - `/health` endpoint now returns `"auth": true|false`
  - macOS: `setAuthHeader(&request)` helper skips header when token is empty; `isConfigured` no longer requires token
  - macOS: ConfigView shows token as optional with updated placeholder
  - Windows: `SetAuthHeader(HttpClient)` overload conditionally sets header; `IsConfigured` no longer requires token
  - Windows: MainWindow save flow no longer blocks on empty token; SSE client conditionally sets auth
  - docker-compose.yml updated with `AUTH_ENABLED` env var
  - New middleware/auth_test.go with 5 test cases
- Files changed:
  - server/config/config.go — added AuthEnabled field, getEnvBool helper
  - server/main.go — conditional auth middleware, auth field in /health
  - server/middleware/auth_test.go — new test file
  - server/docker-compose.yml — AUTH_ENABLED env var
  - macos/CopyEverywhere/Sources/CopyEverywhere/ConfigStore.swift — setAuthHeader helper, isConfigured relaxed
  - macos/CopyEverywhere/Sources/CopyEverywhere/ConfigView.swift — token optional, save/test enabled without token
  - windows/CopyEverywhere/Services/ConfigStore.cs — IsConfigured relaxed
  - windows/CopyEverywhere/Services/ApiClient.cs — SetAuthHeader(HttpClient) overload, conditional auth
  - windows/CopyEverywhere/MainWindow.xaml.cs — removed token requirement for save, conditional SSE auth
  - CLAUDE.md — updated commands and conventions
- **Learnings for future iterations:**
  - The main branch only has initial setup commits; all code lives on `ralph/copy-everywhere-queue-ux`. New feature branches should fork from there.
  - macOS ConfigStore has ~15 places setting the auth header — centralizing into a helper was essential.
  - Windows ApiClient already had a `SetAuthHeader()` but only for the default `_httpClient`. An overload accepting `HttpClient` was needed for the one-off clients (download, upload).
---

## 2026-04-12 - US-036
- What was implemented:
  - New `discovery/` package wrapping `github.com/hashicorp/mdns` (pure-Go, no CGO)
  - `discovery.Start(port, version, authEnabled)` registers mDNS service type `_copyeverywhere._tcp` with TXT records `version=<v>` and `auth=<bool>`
  - `MDNSServer.Shutdown()` deregisters the service (idempotent)
  - `main.go` starts mDNS after config load; signal handler deregisters on SIGINT/SIGTERM
  - Tests verify Start/Shutdown lifecycle and idempotent shutdown; discovery test is non-fatal (multicast depends on network environment)
- Files changed:
  - server/discovery/mdns.go — new mDNS service advertisement package
  - server/discovery/mdns_test.go — lifecycle and discovery tests
  - server/main.go — mDNS startup + signal-based shutdown
  - server/go.mod, server/go.sum — added github.com/hashicorp/mdns dependency
  - CLAUDE.md — documented mDNS pattern
  - prd.json — US-036 passes: true
- **Learnings for future iterations:**
  - `github.com/hashicorp/mdns` is the go-to pure-Go mDNS library. It wraps `github.com/miekg/dns` underneath.
  - mDNS multicast discovery is unreliable in isolated/CI environments — keep discovery tests non-fatal or skip in short mode.
  - Service type `_copyeverywhere._tcp` is the shared constant in `discovery.ServiceType` — clients should use the same string for browsing.
---

## 2026-04-12 - US-037A
- What was implemented:
  - New `macos/CopyEverywhereServer/` SPM project (macOS 13+, executable target)
  - `CopyEverywhereServerApp.swift` — @main entry point + AppDelegate with NSStatusItem + NSPopover (same pattern as client)
  - `ServerProcess.swift` — @MainActor ObservableObject managing Go server binary via Foundation.Process
    - start/stop/restart lifecycle; SIGTERM for graceful shutdown
    - stdout/stderr captured via Pipe with readabilityHandler, surfaced as @Published logLines
    - terminationHandler detects unexpected exits
  - `MenuBarView.swift` — SwiftUI panel with status badge (green/gray), Start/Stop/Restart buttons, scrollable log viewer, Quit button
  - Menu bar icon tints green when running, gray when stopped
  - NSApp.setActivationPolicy(.accessory) hides Dock icon
- Files changed:
  - macos/CopyEverywhereServer/Package.swift — new SPM manifest
  - macos/CopyEverywhereServer/.gitignore — .build/, .swiftpm/
  - macos/CopyEverywhereServer/Sources/CopyEverywhereServer/CopyEverywhereServerApp.swift — app + delegate
  - macos/CopyEverywhereServer/Sources/CopyEverywhereServer/ServerProcess.swift — subprocess manager
  - macos/CopyEverywhereServer/Sources/CopyEverywhereServer/MenuBarView.swift — panel UI
  - CLAUDE.md — architecture and conventions for server host app
  - prd.json — US-037A passes: true
- **Learnings for future iterations:**
  - `Process.terminate()` sends SIGTERM on macOS — matches Go server's existing signal handler for mDNS deregistration.
  - `Pipe.fileHandleForReading.readabilityHandler` is the async-compatible way to stream subprocess output without blocking.
  - Icon tinting via `NSImage` drawing with `.sourceAtop` compositing works for SF Symbols but requires `isTemplate = false`.
  - The server host app is intentionally minimal for US-037A — config panel (US-037B) and launch-at-login (US-037C) are separate stories.
---
